title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 262.847 - Reimbursement for expenses
text:
262.847.  Reimbursement for expenses. — Board members shall receive no compensation for the performance of their duties under sections 262.820 to 262.859, but each board member shall be reimbursed from the funds of the board for actual and necessary expenses incurred in carrying out the member's official duties under sections 262.820 to 262.859.
(L. 2005 S.B. 355)
